chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr.Misc.A.No.180 of 2022 Cr.Misc.A.No.181 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For hearing of case. 2. For hearing of MA No.3474/24 15.1.2025 Mr. Saifullah Abbasi, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Rubina Qadir, Addl.P.G. ------ O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Applicant has challenged through these two Cr.Misc.Applications No.180 and 181 of 2022 an order passed under section 22-A and B Cr.P.C. directing the SHO concerned to record statement of respondent and if cognizable offence is made out, register the FIR, however, the accused shall not be arrested unless any material evidence comes on record. 2. I have heard learned counsel. He has not succeeded in satisfying the court as to how the impugned order is illegal and against the scheme u/s 154 Cr.P.C. which stipulates that if a statement making a cognizable offence is made by the informer, the same has to be reduced into writing in terms of section 154 Cr.P.C. Therefore, I do not find any illegality in the impugned order as a result both the applications are dismissed alongwith listed application. 3. Both these Cr.Misc.Applications are disposed of. JUDGE Hafiz
